pairs.new_question: Does Tc of MgB2 vary monotonically with hydrostatic pressure between ambient and 30 GPa, or is there a non-monotonic regime around the dome?
pairs.rationale: Two reported Tc values (39 K at ambient vs 18 K at 30 GPa) reflect different pressure conditions; the tension is real once we treat ambient-Tc as the baseline result, since neither paper rules out a non-monotonic Tc(P) dome.
